/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libmotor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/motor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/motor_msgs/msg/detail/board_status__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/motor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/motor_msgs/srv/detail/probe_board__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/orangepi/Documents/ros2_motor_demo/build/motor_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libmotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.5 /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
